caption: A gamer reacts to opening a digital card pack in a video game, with the gameplay footage occupying the center and a webcam feed of the man in the bottom left. The man has blonde hair and wears a navy blue shirt and white headphones. In the initial moments, he looks excited with his arms raised. The gameplay screen displays a gold and purple background with neon green circuitry lines and the text "LOVELY PRESENT" in the upper left. A digital card slowly reveals a football player, identified as "JASON PIERRE-PAUL" with the position "ROLB" and a rating of "90". As the sequence progresses, the man's expression shifts from anticipation to a shocked, open-mouthed reaction. The bottom of the screen shows menu options including "MARK/UNMARK," "DISMISS ALL," and "BACK," while the final frame displays stats in the upper right: "173,037," "14,800," "2,343,543," and "LV 19."
